mapper.select:
SELECT YEAR, EHR_PRJ_CD, MORG_CODE, MORG_NAME, PRJ_CD, PRJ_NAME, INVESTMENT_LAST_YEAR_USED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ADJ, INVESTMENT_TOTAL_BUDGET, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_FROZEN, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_LAST_YEAR_USED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY YEAR DESC, EHR_PRJ_CD) AS rn, YEAR, EHR_PRJ_CD, MORG_CODE, MORG_NAME, PRJ_CD, PRJ_NAME, INVESTMENT_LAST_YEAR_USED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ADJ, INVESTMENT_TOTAL_BUDGET, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_FROZEN, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_LAST_YEAR_USED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE FROM V_BUDGET_PROJECT_QUARTERLY_AGGREGATE
) t WHERE t.rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT YEAR, EHR_PRJ_CD, MORG_CODE, MORG_NAME, PRJ_CD, PRJ_NAME, INVESTMENT_LAST_YEAR_USED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ADJ, INVESTMENT_TOTAL_BUDGET, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_FROZEN, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_LAST_YEAR_USED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE FROM V_BUDGET_PROJECT_QUARTERLY_AGGREGATE
ORDER BY YEAR DESC, EHR_PRJ_CD

SELECT YEAR, EHR_PRJ_CD, MORG_CODE, MORG_NAME, PRJ_CD, PRJ_NAME, INVESTMENT_LAST_YEAR_USED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_TOTAL, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ADJ, INVESTMENT_TOTAL_BUDGET, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_FROZEN, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, INVESTMENT_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_LAST_YEAR_USED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q1_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q1_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q2_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q2_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q3_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q3_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_TOTAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ADJ, PAYMENT_Q4_TOTAL_BUDGET, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_FROZEN, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_OCCUPIED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_ACTUAL_APPROVED, PAYMENT_Q4_AMOUNT_AVAILABLE FROM V_BUDGET_PROJECT_QUARTERLY_AGGREGATE
ORDER BY YEAR DESC, EHR_PRJ_CD
